description: Initial non-secret seed manifest for local and Docker review of Mariam executable rebuild foundations.

items.purpose: Seed the CRM Workspace as the first Plugin-managed Business Unit.
Reserve governed runtime object boundaries for providers, connectors, tools, and services.
Ensure first-run actions write governance evidence to DB MARIAM.

security.notes: This file contains seed metadata only. It must not contain passwords, tokens, private keys, or runtime data.
